{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=While 108 roses are often used for a proposal, a romance player presented 107 roses, saying, "These roses represent my affection. The missing one? It signifies my intention to keep you in my thoughts, as I cannot make any promises."
|affct=ART
|hard=DEF
|source=Snalentines Pack, 2025
|color=purple
|earth=7
|water=7
|fire=6
|wind=6
|form=Dragon
|element=Fire
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
